subparts.text: List three prominent features of a Dutch residence or bungalow.
What is a Gajaprastha Gokhada/Jharokha? Explain with a sketch.
Name the architects who designed the Triveni Kala Sangam, Delhi and IIT Kanpur.
Share your experience or understanding of the architecture of the Institute of Indology in Ahmedabad.
What is HUDCO, and why was it established?
Name three architects who actively promoted sustainability, appropriate technology, and regional architectural practices in India post independence.
Define globalization in terms of architecture. Mention three new building typologies that emerged as a result of globalization.
What is the Pradhan Mantri Awas Yojana ? Highlight the difference between PMAY-U and PMAY-G.

questions.question_text: Summarize the architectural style of the Nawabs of Lucknow in five points, with specific reference to the Asafi Mosque Complex, supported by illustrations.
What is Indo-Saracenic architecture? Explain four distinct stylistic features of this style with the help of illustrations.
With a focus on regional and contextual sensitivity, discuss the architecture of Charles Correa in five points, citing one of his projects as an example. Draw suitable sketches.
How did architect like Raj Rewal help shape Indian architecture post-independence? Explain through Asiad Games Village as an example.
Describe the philosophy and architectural approach of Laurie Baker in five points, using illustrations to support your explanation.
Compare and contrast the philosophies, design principles, and architectural works of Charles Correa and B.V. Doshi in five key points.
What are satellite towns and their pattern of growth? Identify any two satellite towns each around two different cities in India.
What are the various stages of growth and expansion for an urban city? Explain each stage with examples.
